testcase.name: AC-7: creates History row with agentId=private_domain and traceId
AC-7: creates DiagnosisReport row with agentId=DiagnosisAgent and traceId
zod: rejects answers array with wrong length
calls diagnosisReport.findMany with default limit=10
calls diagnosisReport.findFirst ordered by createdAt desc
returns null when no reports found
AC-7: creates FeedbackLog row with rating and agentId
returns profile config when profile exists
returns default config when profile does not exist
upserts EvolutionProfile and returns ok + updated config
calls evolutionInsight.findMany with default limit=20
calls feedbackLog.findMany and returns array
passes agentId filter to where clause when provided
returns mock trend data with requested days
returns mock ranking array
calls deepLearningArchive.findMany with isActive filter by default
creates DeepLearningArchive with sourceType=text
creates archive with sourceType=file and placeholder sample
updates archive learningStatus to pending and returns {ok:true, status:"queued"}
soft-deletes archive by setting isActive=false
